mapper.select: SELECT id, post_id, user_id, author, content, status, created_at, updated_at FROM comments WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, post_id, user_id, author, content, status, created_at, updated_at FROM comments WHERE id = #{commentId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments ( post_id, user_id, author, content, status ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{userId}, #{author}, #{content}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET status = 'DELETED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{commentId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
